授業方法: This class will be held in English as a communicative 4-skills workshop. Active participation is expected from all students.

Implementation method: Online Class (on-demand) / Online class & Online Class（Task-oriented format). Class hours 《90minutes》

Topics: Talking about change; comparing time periods; describing possible consequences
